ground_truth.title: 2012 Mercedes-Benz CLS550 for sale
ground_truth.main_content: 2012 Mercedes-Benz CLS550 for sale - Detailed vehicle specifications including Braking & Traction (4-Wheel ABS, 4-Wheel Disc Brakes, Traction/Stability Control, Tire Pressure Monitoring System), Passenger Restraint (Driver Air Bag, Passenger Air Bag, Side Air Bag, Side Head Air Bag, Rear Body Side Air Bag, Rear Head side Air Bag), Road Visibility (HID Headlights, Daytime Running Lights, Fog Lamps, Electrochromic Rearview Mirror, Intermittent Wipers, Variable Inter. Wipers, Rain Sensing Wipers), Accident Prevention (Rear Parking Aid, Back-Up Camera, Handsfree Wireless), and Security (Alarm, Anti-theft System, Telematics). Original Warranty information: Basic 4 Years/50,000 Miles, Roadside Assistance Unlimited Years/Unlimited Miles. Mercedes-Benz Certified Pre-Owned Warranty provides 12 months Unlimited vehicle miles coverage beginning at expiration of New Vehicle Limited Warranty. Eligibility: Model Years 2012-2015 / 75,000 miles. Features include Lease Term Certified, Return/Exchange Program, Special Financing, Transferrable Warranty, and Warranty Deductible. Source: www.autotrader.com
with: The MBCPO Limited warranty provides vehicle coverage for 12 months and Unlimited vehicle miles and begins at the expiration of the New Vehicle Limited Warranty.
4-Wheel ABS Std, 4-Wheel Disc Brakes, Traction/Stability Control, Tire Pressure Monitoring System are key braking and traction features.
HID Headlights, Daytime Running Lights, Fog Lamps, Electrochromic Rearview Mirror, Rain Sensing Wipers provide road visibility.
Rear Parking Aid, Back-Up Camera, Handsfree Wireless help with accident prevention.
Basic Warranty: Typically covers everything except for parts that wear out through normal use of the vehicle.
